hooks.command: sh -lc 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/wave_stop.py" ]; then exec python3 "$d/.codex/wave_stop.py"; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; printf "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\".codex/wave_stop.py not found; restore the project Stop hook before continuing.\",\"stopReason\":\"wave_stop_not_found\",\"systemMessage\":\".codex/wave_stop.py not found, stop loop.\"}\n"'
